meta.description: Explicit programme groups used as inheritance and application-window scope targets.

groups.name: Cambridge taught master's
groups.description: Tracked taught master's programmes at the University of Cambridge.

groups.name: ETH master's programmes
groups.description: Master's degree programmes covered by ETH Zurich's general application rules.

groups.name: UCL graduate taught
groups.description: Graduate taught programmes at University College London.

groups.name: HKU Computing and Data Science taught postgraduate programmes
groups.description: Taught postgraduate programmes offered by HKU's School of Computing and Data Science.

groups.name: NTU master's by coursework
groups.description: Coursework master's programmes with programme-specific intake periods.

groups.name: UChicago Applied Data Science master's
groups.description: In-person and online MS in Applied Data Science routes.

groups.name: PKU standard international graduate admissions
groups.description: International graduate programmes using PKU's standard application period; English-taught master's programmes may publish separate dates.

groups.name: Yenching Academy
groups.description: Yenching Academy's interdisciplinary master's programme and separate admissions route.

groups.name: Penn Engineering master's programmes
groups.description: On-campus master's programmes sharing Penn Engineering's published admissions timeline.

groups.name: Cornell Engineering MEng programmes
groups.description: Professional Master of Engineering programmes whose deadlines are published by their fields and departments.

groups.name: Tsinghua international computing programmes
groups.description: English-taught graduate computing programmes for international applicants.

groups.name: Berkeley Master of Engineering programmes
groups.description: One-year professional engineering master's programmes with department-specific admissions instructions.

groups.name: Melbourne graduate coursework
groups.description: Graduate coursework programmes whose intake dates are published on individual course pages.

groups.name: UNSW postgraduate coursework
groups.description: Postgraduate coursework programmes using standard term dates or programme-specific exceptions.
